fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, consisting of pixel data and a display duration.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, combining pixel data with a display duration. Frames are passed to <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame},SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions)" /> to produce the animation.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
};
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, SKWebpEncoderOptions.Default);
// data is SKData? — check for null before use
if (data != null)
    File.WriteAllBytes("output.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a bitmap and a duration.

params.duration: The length of time to display this frame.
params.bitmap: The bitmap providing the pixel data for this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from an image and a duration.

params.image: The image providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The length of time to display this frame.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct from a pixmap and a duration.

params.pixmap: The pixmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The length of time to display this frame.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the length of time to display this frame.
fields.value: A <see cref="T:System.TimeSpan" /> indicating how long the frame is shown.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
fields.value: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the frame pixels.
